trace: Calling setX(v) invokes dispatchSetState (ReactFiberHooks.js:3598), which calls dispatchSetStateInternal to enqueue the update and then calls scheduleUpdateOnFiber(root, fiber, lane) at line 3590. scheduleUpdateOnFiber marks the fiber root as having pending work, then calls ensureRootIsScheduled(root) (ReactFiberRootScheduler.js:116), which is the function that actually schedules a task with the Scheduler to drive the render loop.
notes: dispatchSetStateInternal is the immediate caller of scheduleUpdateOnFiber; ensureRootIsScheduled is the true scheduling handoff point
